fullText:
center 83548 Adding fix for Indirect Events Overriding Clock Out Time Issue Table of Contents Contents This document details the configuration steps needed to add the fix for the “Indirect Events Overriding Clock Out Times” issue . TOC \o \z \u \h 1. System Code Enablement PAGEREF _Toc210744014 \h 3 1. System Code Enablement Open System Codes UI and sort by Code Type (ascending) Select the code type ‘000’ . Select ‘Code IDs’ . Select ‘Add’. Fill in the blanks as shown below. Select the Enablement Flag as shown below. Select ‘Save’ . Search for the new custom code in the list and select it. It may be helpful to sort by Code ID (ascending). Confirm that the fields are filled out correctly and that the parameter is enabled, as shown above .

[Document: LM Indirect Event Overriding Clock Out Fix Configuration Guide SDN 291]

center 83548 Adding fix for Indirect Events Overriding Clock Out Time Issue Table of Contents Contents This document details the configuration steps needed to add the fix for the “Indirect Events Overriding Clock Out Times” issue . TOC     1. System Code Enablement  1. System Code Enablement Open System Codes UI and sort by Code Type (ascending) Select the code type ‘000’ . Select ‘Code IDs’ . Select ‘Add’. Fill in the blanks as shown below. Select the Enablement Flag as shown below. Select ‘Save’ . Search for the new custom code in the list and select it. It may be helpful to sort by Code ID (ascending). Confirm that the fields are filled out correctly and that the parameter is enabled, as shown above .
